name: Cherri - Galactic Traveler #14
description:
"Take a deep breath and empty your head of those silly little thoughts. That's right, it feels good to let me think for you..."

You've crash-landed on an alien world, and a strange plant woman has found you. She seems nice, surely she can be trusted?

A return to Ryl's homeworld: Vesh-III! This leafy lady can make anyone who breathes in her pollen her blissful simp. She has so much planned for you...

Cherri is a skilled hypnotist who makes her prey willingly submit. She's afraid of technology, which may offer you a way to resist her. But why would you want to resist when her words are so easy to listen to?

As a hypnotist, Cherri will try to hijack your senses, making you feel what she wants you to feel. (Her people are known as 'Zarash' by the Vesh, or 'Alarunes' by explorers.)

"I have so many gifts for you, since you're being so good for me."
creator: Prinkles
